name: bmak-exam-prep-quiz
description: BMAK Macroeconomics 1 – modular exam-prep quiz (IS-LM, Mundell-Fleming, Policy Effectiveness, etc.)

scripts.count: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');let n=0;const ids=new Set();fs.readdirSync('questions').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.js')).forEach(f=>{const c=fs.readFileSync(path.join('questions',f),'utf8');const m=c.match(/id:\"[^\"]+\"/g)||[];m.forEach(id=>ids.add(id));n+=m.length;});console.log('Total questions:',n);console.log('Unique IDs:',ids.size);"

author: BMAK students / Grok team
